title: Mouse Extermination in SoHo | $350-$600 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional mouse extermination in SoHo, Manhattan. Same-day service for lofts, galleries & restaurants. Licensed exterminators. Call now: $350-$600.
intro: SoHo's iconic cast-iron buildings and bustling ground-floor establishments create perfect conditions for mouse infestations. Our specialized mouse extermination services protect SoHo's unique loft spaces, art galleries, and retail stores from rodent damage and health risks. With same-day response and discreet service, we keep your SoHo property mouse-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC understands SoHo's distinctive architecture and the need for discreet, effective pest control that won't disrupt your business or residential space. Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly methods tailored to historic cast-iron buildings and modern loft conversions, ensuring complete mouse elimination while preserving your property's character.
localContext: SoHo's historic cast-iron buildings with their original infrastructure, combined with the neighborhood's dense mix of high-end retail, galleries, and residential lofts, create unique entry points for mice. The constant foot traffic along Broadway, Prince Street, and West Broadway, plus numerous restaurants and cafes, provide ample food sources that attract rodents to the area.

faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in SoHo?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in SoHo typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the size of your space, severity of the infestation, and whether you're in a loft, retail space, or multi-unit building. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: Why are mice so common in SoHo buildings?
faqs.answer: SoHo's historic cast-iron buildings often have gaps in original masonry, aging infrastructure, and numerous entry points through basement access and loading areas. The neighborhood's concentration of restaurants, cafes, and food retailers provides abundant food sources, while the subway system and old utility lines create pathways for mice to travel between buildings.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in SoHo?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service throughout SoHo and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call. We understand that mice in retail spaces, galleries, or restaurants require immediate attention to protect your reputation and comply with health regulations.

faqs.question: Are your mouse extermination methods safe for SoHo loft spaces with pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use eco-friendly, low-toxicity treatments that are safe for families and pets in residential lofts. Our technicians tailor methods to your specific space, whether it's a live-work loft, gallery, or retail environment, using strategic placement of traps and exclusion techniques that prioritize safety while effectively eliminating mice.
